message:
refactor(types): extract EXT4_SECTOR_SIZE and EXT4_SB_CHECKSUM_OFFSET constants

Replace 20 scattered magic-number occurrences of `/ 512` (ext4 i_blocks
sector accounting) and `0x3FC` (superblock checksum offset) with named
constants in ffs-types, used across ffs-core, ffs-ondisk, and ffs-repair.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
